name: StudioArchitect
description: Native macOS photography workflow app (single self-contained product, App Store / sandboxed) managing sessions from SD card import through client delivery
next_action: Phase 1: Verify project builds, confirm GRDB is integrated via SPM, and wire up database migrations and record types
notes: Architecture pivot (2026-06-21): dropped the hub+shared-DB+launch-other-apps model. Studio Architect is now a single self-contained app that natively implements the full pipeline (incl. ML cull). Standalone apps (CullSnap/FirstPass/TriPod) are separate feature incubators with NO integration, sunset over time. Distribution = Mac App Store (sandboxed): EXIF via ImageIO not exiftool, SD/drive access via security-scoped bookmarks, DB in app container. Audience = hobbyist/side-hustler. Pricing = placeholder, to revisit. Docs (CLAUDE.md, both foundation docs, dev plan) updated to match. Skeleton exists but not yet built/run; UI placeholder.
